public static UIRuntime Create(
        UIViewConfigTable configTable,
        GameObject uiRootObject,
        Camera uiCamera,
        Transform hiddenRoot,
        GameObject inputBlockObject,
        GameObject maskObject)
    {
        return Create(
            configTable,
            uiRootObject,
            uiCamera,
            hiddenRoot,
            inputBlockObject,
            maskObject,
            new AddressablesUIAssetService());
    }
